■ Who We Are

About Us

Emmanuel John Institute of Science and Technology (EJIST) is a DepEd-approved and TESDA-accredited institution located at 237 M.H. Del Pilar Street, 11th Avenue, Grace Park East, Caloocan City. We have been shaping futures since 2009.

Our campus offers quality education across Senior High School, College, and Technical-Vocational programs — designed to produce globally competitive, skilled, and professional graduates ready to serve the nation and the world.

Mission

To provide a globally competitive, knowledgeable, skillful, and professional workforce toward the economic development of our nation.

Vision

To be a leading educational institution in its field of expertise — where hope and confidence matter.

■ Grades 11 & 12 — TVL Track

Senior High
School

EJIST offers the Technical-Vocational-Livelihood (TVL) Track under the DepEd K-12 curriculum. Students may also avail of the Voucher Program for free Senior High School education.

01
🏠
Home Economics

Train in practical life skills and hospitality services for immediate employment readiness.

Specializations include: Food & Beverage Services Housekeeping Front Office Services
02
⚙️
Industrial Arts

Hands-on technical training in construction, electrical, and mechanical fields for industry readiness.

Specializations include: Electrical Installation Drafting Technology
03
💻
ICT Strand

Develop digital and technology skills — the foundation for careers in IT and computer systems.

Specializations include: Computer Programming Hardware Servicing Electronics
■ Undergraduate Programs

College

EJIST offers college programs designed to develop skilled, job-ready graduates. Our courses are accredited and aligned with industry demands, giving students a solid foundation for professional careers.

01 —

Information Technology Management

ITM — Bachelor's Degree

Build expertise in IT systems, software, networks, and digital solutions. Prepare for a career at the forefront of technology and business innovation.

Inquire now →
02 —

Hotel & Restaurant Services

HRS — Bachelor's Degree

Master the art of hospitality management, culinary arts, and hotel operations. Open doors to careers in tourism, food service, and hotel management worldwide.

Inquire now →
■ TESDA Accredited Programs

TESDA

EJIST is a TESDA-accredited Assessment Center offering 8 nationally certified programs. Earn your National Certificate (NC) and become job-ready fast — at an affordable cost.

Animation NC II
Assessment Fee: ₱1,200.00 · 6 hrs
Bread and Pastry Production NC II
Assessment Fee: ₱1,720.00 · 4 hrs
Computer Systems Servicing NC II
Assessment Fee: ₱1,049.00 · 6 hrs 50 mins
Events Management Services NC III
Assessment Fee: ₱905.00 · 4 hrs
Food and Beverages Services NC II
Assessment Fee: ₱882.00 · 4 hrs 40 mins
Housekeeping NC II
Assessment Fee: ₱1,108.00 · 3 hrs 40 mins
Technical Drafting NC II
Assessment Fee: ₱1,046.00 · 6 hrs
Visual Graphic Design NC III
Assessment Fee: ₱932.00 · 7 hrs
